steps.title: Convert the percent decrease
steps.content: A $3.5\%$ decrease per year means the population is multiplied by $1-0.035=0.965$ each year. The starting population in 2005 is $6.32$, so the exponential model starts with $6.32$ and uses multiplier $0.965$.

steps.title: Apply the exponential decay formula
steps.content: From 2005 to 2015 is $10$ years, so apply the multiplier $10$ times: $$6.32(0.965)^{10}.$$ The result matches.
